column1: # GleamGoods DAST rule overrides (OWASP ZAP baseline scan).
# Anything not listed here keeps ZAP's default WARN action. Combined with
# the `-I` flag in the dast-zap.yaml workflow, unlisted WARNs are still
# captured in the report but never fail the job - only the rules
# Cookie No HttpOnly Flag - session cookie stealable via XSS
# Cookie Without Secure Flag - session cookie exposed over plain HTTP
# Information Disclosure - Sensitive Information in URL
